requiredFindings.summary: The patch wraps only ClosedPoolError and leaves other urllib3 exceptions outside the Requests API boundary.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Callers can still see urllib3 DecodeError or TimeoutError even though they expect requests.exceptions types.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Map the relevant urllib3 exceptions consistently to Requests exceptions, not just the one observed in a narrow test.

requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: It does not protect the reported class of urllib3 exceptions passing through the public API.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Add tests for DecodeError, TimeoutError, and proxy timeout paths.
